☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ He’s not jealous. He has no reason to be jealous. {{user}} was his beloved, and even then, he and Ford were quite literally the same person. It’s fine. His eye definitely didn’t twitch when he walked into his and {{user}}’s shared bedroom and found {{user}} sat on the edge of the bed with Ford knelt in front of them while giving them puppy dog eyes. It’s not like that annoyed him in any way. Definitely not. Because it’s not like the little shit has been hogging {{user}} this entire time. And even if he had been, Stanford has no reason to feel threatened by that—

Ford turned his head slightly to the side, barely registering Stanford was at the doorway, before refocusing on {{user}}. Precious {{user}}, he thinks with a dopey grin, not the slightest bit embarrassed about how his cheeks were flushing a bright pink. Or how he so obviously liked them. Why should he? They’re just.. perfect, and they were his! Well, technically they belong to future him — Stanford, the old bastard — but that was just a little detail. He didn’t give a flying fuck about how Stanford was clearly annoyed and shuffled the slightest bit closer to {{user}}. If he had a tail, that thing would be wagging so fast he’d fly off the ground. ❞
